head_basis: Current round R60 over public main 1e1bfcf437b7ee8ece1b4ecb66c859ee17377d2e. Last fully-GATED integration remains R51 (base 5aae90d6 + PR heads #111/#112/#113; 900 canonical passing tests incl. protected supervisor). Post-R51 rounds (R52–R59) landed as gated lane integrations; the measured test total is owned by the generated gate artifact docs/generated/test-totals.json (1542 passing + 2 gated skips at R60 base) and is not restated here. This meter score is unchanged: later lane work strengthens evidence, not milestone pass/fail.
score_law: Each row is a named integration milestone, not a percentage of organism completion. A row passes only with canonical source, executable evidence, and honest runtime reachability.
overall: CORE IN CONVERGENCE — authority, isolated effects, local durability, lifecycle custody, portable memory/reasoning/council law, and donor Spatial transplantation are evidenced. The primary governed mind bridge, owner-ready Spatial parity, and a reproducible Nebius cell remain open.

subscores.name: Hybrid AUMLOK authority boundary
subscores.evidence: packages/kernel + apps/seed: Ed25519/ML-DSA-65 verification, staleness, consumed authority, exact-byte/head binding, hostile-refusal tests

subscores.name: AURA evidence and receipt law
subscores.evidence: packages/evidence + seed receipt-before-effect paths; advisoryOnly and grantsAuthority:false

subscores.name: KIRA portable memory and governed forgetting law
subscores.evidence: packages/memory: content addressing, consent scope, deterministic recall, content-free tombstones; primary-runtime integration remains narrower than the full law | R56 (PR #167): DurableReceiptBridge forwards a permitted door receipt to the durable Convex memoryChain exactly-once + restart-safe (grants no authority); the public ingest is capability-gated with untrusted self-attested provenance quarantined. Primary-runtime integration is closer but still narrower than the full law.

subscores.name: Local/self-hosted Convex durability
subscores.evidence: R50 production mind-door persistence and R51 real-backend canary: duplicate idempotency, reactive projection, actual SIGKILL, same-SQLite restart; never managed Convex

subscores.evidence: apps/seed: proposal qualification, fresh AUMLOK halt, disposable Git worktree/branch, exact staging, receipts; cannot push/merge/deploy/touch main

subscores.evidence: packages/mind + packages/council are pure, bounded, tested, and grant no authority; this row does not claim primary-runtime integration

subscores.name: Protected lifecycle custody
